title: Family — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script: Sara: Peter, pozri. Toto je moja rodina. Peter: Kto je toto na fotke? Sara: To je moja mama a toto je môj otec. Bývajú v Taliansku. Peter: A toto sú tvoji súrodenci? Sara: Áno. Toto je môj brat a toto je moja sestra. Peter: Máš veľkú rodinu. Sara: Áno. Mám aj babičku, dedka, tetu a strýka. Peter: A deti? Máš deti? Sara: Nie. Som slobodná. Nemám manžela a nemám deti. Peter: Ja som ženatý. Moja manželka sa volá Anna. Máme syna a dcéru. Sara: A tvoji svokrovci? Peter: Moja svokra a môj svokor bývajú blízko. Prídu v nedeľu.

Peter: A toto sú tvoji súrodenci? Sara: Áno. Toto je môj brat a toto je moja sestra. Peter: Máš veľkú rodinu. Sara: Áno. Mám aj babičku, dedka, tetu a strýka. Peter: A deti? Máš deti? Sara: Nie. Som slobodná. Nemám manžela a nemám deti. Peter: Ja som ženatý. Moja manželka sa volá Anna. Máme syna a dcéru. Sara: A tvoji svokrovci? Peter: Moja svokra a môj svokor bývajú blízko. Prídu v nedeľu.

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

exercises.conversationTranscriptSk: Sara: Peter, pozri. Toto je moja rodina. Peter: Kto je toto na fotke? Sara: To je moja mama a toto je môj otec. Bývajú v Taliansku. Peter: A toto sú tvoji súrodenci? Sara: Áno. Toto je môj brat a toto je moja sestra. Peter: Máš veľkú rodinu. Sara: Áno. Mám aj babičku, dedka, tetu a strýka. Peter: A deti? Máš deti? Sara: Nie. Som slobodná. Nemám manžela a nemám deti. Peter: Ja som ženatý. Moja manželka sa volá Anna. Máme syna a dcéru. Sara: A tvoji svokrovci? Peter: Moja svokra a môj svokor bývajú blízko. Prídu v nedeľu.

questions.questionEn: Sara says "Toto je moja rodina." What is she showing Peter?
questions.answerMeaning: "Toto je moja rodina" = This is my family. Rodina is the key family word in this scene.

questions.questionEn: Who are in the first picture Sara explains?
questions.answerMeaning: Sara says: "To je moja mama a toto je môj otec" = This is my mother and this is my father.

questions.questionEn: Peter asks "A toto sú tvoji súrodenci?" What is he asking about?
questions.answerMeaning: "Súrodenci" = siblings. Sara answers with "môj brat" and "moja sestra" = my brother and my sister.

questions.questionEn: Which extended family members does Sara mention?
questions.answerMeaning: Sara says: "Mám aj babičku, dedka, tetu a strýka" = I also have a grandma, grandpa, aunt, and uncle.

questions.questionEn: What does Sara say about her relationship status and children?

answers.textEn: She is married and has two children
She is divorced and has one daughter
She is single and has no husband or children

questions.answerMeaning: "Som slobodná. Nemám manžela a nemám deti" = I am single. I do not have a husband and I do not have children.

reviewPair.english: I am single. I do not have children.

questions.questionEn: What does Peter say about Anna and his children?

answers.textEn: Anna is his sister, and they have no children
Anna is his wife, and they have a son and daughter
Anna is his mother-in-law, and they have cousins

questions.answerMeaning: Peter says: "Moja manželka sa volá Anna. Máme syna a dcéru" = My wife is called Anna. We have a son and a daughter.

sentences.promptEn: This is my family. Who is this in the picture?
This is my mother and this is my father.
This is my brother and this is my sister.
I also have a grandma, grandpa, aunt, and uncle.
I am single. I do not have a husband and I do not have children.
My wife is called Anna. We have a son and a daughter.
